summary: High‑energy 1982 show captured on a solid Exec Crew audience tape; despite minor flaws the recording sounds great and fans call it killer.
review: Both reviewers praise this 1982 summer tour performance, calling it “KILLER” and highlighting the quality of the Exec Crew audience source. While one notes some inevitable recording glitches, the overall consensus is that the sound is clear enough to make the show enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive remarks about both performance and tape quality outweigh the brief mention of minor recording flaws; limited review count reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Exec Crew audience source praised for its vivid sound, though one reviewer mentions typical recording issues/flaws inherent to crowd tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers focus on overall energy and improvisational vibe.
